penalties.description: The cut noticeably deviates from the marked circle at several points.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on task completion and phases detected. GPT-4o's completion time of 93 seconds is more consistent with the proficiency target of 98 seconds. Both models identified line deviation penalties, with GPT-4o's 5-point deduction being more conservative than Claude's 15-point deduction.

disagreements.rationale: GPT-4o's completion time aligns better with the proficiency target of 98 seconds and is more consistent with successful task completion within reasonable time bounds.

Both models identified line deviation but Claude's 15-point penalty appears excessive. GPT-4o's 5-point deduction is more proportionate for minor deviations that still result in successful circle completion.
